def negative_coroutine_result_discarded_without_await():
    rule_id = "coroutine_result_discarded_without_await"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Coroutine object assigned or returned without await, so the coroutine body never executes."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
